# GSL Components — User Guide

## Overview
React component library (@rfdtech/components) for admin dashboards. Themed with CSS custom properties, built on Radix UI + cmdk.

## Layout
- **AppLayout** — auto-positioning shell. Wrap AppHeader, AppSidebar, AppBody as direct children.
- **AppHeader** — top bar with AppHeaderSearch, AppHeaderActions, AppHeaderNotifications, AppHeaderProfile
- **Sidebar** — collapsible nav with SidebarLink, SidebarGroup, SidebarBrand, mobile overlay
- **Card** — surface wrapper with header prop, --gsl-surface-card background

## Inputs
All support controlled/uncontrolled via value/onChange and RHF via FormField.

- **CountrySelector** — country dropdown with flag emoji and search
- **DateSelector** — date picker with calendar popover
- **DateRangeSelector** — From/To date range with shared calendar
- **Dropdown** — select with clearable, invalid, aria-label
- **NetworkOperator** — operator selector with images (MTN, Vodafone, AirtelTigo, Glo)
- **OtpInput** — 6-digit OTP with paste, keyboard nav, onComplete
- **PhoneNumberInput** — phone input with country code prefix and auto-detection
- **UploadField** — drag-and-drop file upload with type icons

## Data
- **Table** — URL-driven table with TableSearch, TableFilter, TableContent, TablePagination. Requires paramPrefix.
- **MetricCard** — dashboard metric with trend indicator (up/down/neutral)
- **ProgressBar** — determinate/indeterminate with variants

## Overlays
- **Command** — cmd+k palette with search, groups, keyboard shortcuts
- **Dialog** — modal with overlay, title, description, close button
- **Modal** — full-viewport shell with header, body, footer
- **Popover** — floating panel anchored to trigger
- **Sheet** — edge-sliding panel (top/right/bottom/left)
- **Toast** — notification toasts via Sonner

## Navigation
- **AppSwitcher** — 9-dot app launcher grid
- **Breadcrumb** — hierarchical trail
- **Tabs** — default and line variants with animated indicator
- **SidebarLink** — nav items with icon, label, badge, active state

## Form
- **Field** — accessible wrapper with FieldLabel, FieldControl, FieldDescription, FieldError
- **Form** — RHF adapter with FormField
- **Input** — text input with invalid/disabled states
- **Textarea** — multiline input
- **Checkbox** — with optional label
- **RadioGroup** — default and card variants
- **Button** — primary, secondary, outline, ghost variants with loading
- **Badge** — inline label with semantic variants
- **BulkImportModal** — multi-step CSV import wizard

## Interaction
- **Draggable** — repositionable panel with handle
- **Sortable** — drag-and-drop list reordering

## Theme
- Light/dark/system modes via ThemeProvider
- CSS tokens: --gsl-bg, --gsl-text, --gsl-primary, --gsl-border, --gsl-hover, --gsl-error, --gsl-success, --gsl-warning, --gsl-rounded-base, --gsl-radius-xl, --gsl-radius-2xl, --gsl-surface-card, --gsl-z-*
- Override tokens on any ancestor to theme

## Hooks
- **useDebounce** — debounced value
- **useTableState** — URL-driven table state (page, search, filters, sort)
- **useTablePagination** — URL-driven pagination
- **useTableFilter** — URL-driven filter state
- **useDialogSearchParam** / **useModalSearchParam** — URL-driven overlay state
- **useSidebar** — sidebar open/collapsed/mobile state

## Patterns
- Every component accepts className and classNames (part-level overrides)
- All inputs: value/onChange for controlled, or omit for uncontrolled
- RHF: FormField → Field → FieldControl → component
- No emojis in library code or docs (flag emojis in CountrySelector only)
